title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Skill Brief: Integration Defense
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext integration defense increment in a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

options.text: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
A technically working demo is a complete extension product. This does not resolve predict integration defense.

For predict integration defense, apply Integration Defense without its stated preconditions, omit the a production skill and MCP integration package trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Integration Defense for a production skill and MCP integration package.

steps.title: Build Integration Defense evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-integration-defense-k0xtlk: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Integration Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-integration-defense-k0xtlk:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
